debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

failed_attempts:
have hN' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < n := by
    have : (N : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast hn
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le hN this
  have hbapos : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hdenpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hnRpos : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have h1 : (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < 1 / n := by
    have := (one_div_lt_one_div_of_lt hdenpos hnRpos).2 hN'
    simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using this
  have h2 : 2 * (b - a) / n < 2 * (b - a) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := by
    have hmul : 0 < 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [hbapos]
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h1 hmul)
  have h3 : (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = δ := by
    field_simp [hbapos.ne']
  simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, h3, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using lt_of_lt_of_eq h2 h3

have hn' : (1 : ℝ) / n < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by
    have : (1 : ℝ) / n ≤ (1 : ℝ) / N := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le (by exact_mod_cast hn) (by exact_mod_cast Npos)
    have hN' : (1 : ℝ) / N < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by
      have hN'' : (1 : ℝ) / N < 1 / (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))) := by
        simpa [one_div] using (one_div_lt_one_div_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast Npos) hN)
      simpa [one_div, inv_inv] using hN''
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hN'
  have hbapos : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith
  have hmul : (2 * (b - a)) * ((1 : ℝ) / n) < (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) :=
    mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hn' (by nlinarith [hbapos])
  simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hmul

have hδba : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hδba_lt : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < (n : ℝ) := by
    calc
      1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < (N : ℝ) := hN
      _ ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hn_inv : (1 : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by

    have hden_pos : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := pos1
    exact (one_div_lt (by simpa using hδba)).2 hδba_lt
  have hbap : 0 < 2 * (b - a) := by bound
  have : (2 * (b - a)) * ((1 : ℝ) / (n : ℝ)) < (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) :=

  simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this

have hba : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith
  have hδdiv : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hN' : (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))))⁻¹ > (↑N)⁻¹ := by
    have := inv_lt_inv_of_lt pos1 hN
    simpa using this
  have hN'' : (δ / (2 * (b - a))) > (↑N)⁻¹ := by

  have hnN : (↑n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hn_inv : (↑n : ℝ)⁻¹ ≤ (↑N : ℝ)⁻¹ := by

  have hn'' : (↑n : ℝ)⁻¹ < δ / (2 * (b - a)) :=

  have hmul : (2 * (b - a)) * (↑n : ℝ)⁻¹ < (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := by
    exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hn'' (by nlinarith [hba])
  have : 2 * (b - a) / (↑n : ℝ) < δ := by
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using

        have : (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = δ := by

  simpa using this

have hbapos : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hδdivpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by

  have hNpos : (0 : ℝ) < (N : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Npos

  have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hle1 : (1 : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) ≤ (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := by

    have : (2 * (b - a)) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = δ := by

    have : (2 * (b - a)) * ((1 : ℝ) / (n : ℝ)) ≤ δ := by simpa [this] using hmul_le
    exact lt_of_le_of_ne' this (by

        exact (mul_left_cancel₀ (ne_of_gt hpos)).1 (by simpa [hEq] using congrArg (fun t => t) rfl)
      have : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = (n : ℝ) := by

  simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hmul_lt

have hδpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hnbound : (δ / (2 * (b - a)))⁻¹ < (n : ℝ) := by

    have : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < (N : ℝ) := hN

  have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos

  have hn_inv : (1 : ℝ) / n ≤ δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by
    have := (one_div_le_one_div_of_le hnposR hdenpos).2 hn'

  have hmul : 2 * (b - a) * (1 / (n : ℝ)) ≤ 2 * (b - a) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) :=

  have hmul' : 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) ≤ δ := by

have hδpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have htwo : (2 : ℝ) * (b - a) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = δ := by

  have hn' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < n := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)
  have hn'' : (2 : ℝ) * (b - a) / n < (2 : ℝ) * (b - a) / (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))) := by

  have : (2 : ℝ) * (b - a) / n < δ := by

  have hn' : (δ / (2 * (b - a)))⁻¹ < (n : ℝ) := by

have hbapos : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith
  have hδdivpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hnN : (N : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hNlt : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < (N : ℝ) := hN

have hbn : (b - a) / n < δ / 2 := by
    have hn' : (δ / (2 * (b - a)))⁻¹ < (n : ℝ) := by
      have hN' : (δ / (2 * (b - a)))⁻¹ < (N : ℝ) := by

    have hbapos : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith [hab]
    have hmul := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left this hbapos
    have : (b - a) * (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < (b - a) * (n : ℝ)⁻¹ := hmul
    have : δ / 2 < (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by

    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using this

have hδba : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hbn : (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) ≤ δ := by
    have hNle : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) ≤ (N : ℝ) := by linarith [hN]

have hbapos : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith
  have hδdivpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hn' : δ / (2 * (b - a)) < (n : ℝ) := by
    have hN' : δ / (2 * (b - a)) < (N : ℝ) := by

      have hpos' : 0 < (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) : ℝ) := by bound

have hn' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) ≤ n := by

  have hn_ge : (δ / (2 * (b - a)))⁻¹ < (n : ℝ) := lt_of_lt_of_le hN hNle
  have hdiv : (2 * (b - a)) / δ < (n : ℝ) := by
    simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hn_ge
  have hlt : (2 * (b - a)) / n < δ := by
    have : (2 * (b - a)) / n < (2 * (b - a)) / ((2 * (b - a)) / δ) := by
      exact (div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by nlinarith [hbapos]) hdiv)
    simpa [div_div, hbapos.ne', hδ₁.ne'] using this
  simpa using hlt
